name: Booneville Butterscotch Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter in a heavy 10-inch skillet. Heat until melted. Add brown sugar and 1/2 cup milk; mix well. Bring to a boil and cook for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
2. Beat the egg yolks. Stir in the remaining milk. Combine flour and salt; stir the egg mixture into this. Gradually add a small amount of the hot brown sugar mixture. Stir and return it to the mixture in the skillet. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
3. Cool slightly and blend in 1 teaspoon vanilla. Pour into the pre-baked and cooled pie crust.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Slowly add sugar and continue to beat until dissolved. Fold in the remaining 1/4 teaspoon vanilla. Pile this on top of the pie, sealing to the edges.
5. Bake in a preheated 325-degree oven for about 10-15 minutes or until lightly browned. Serve warm or cold.
